I'll run `tokentrail_compare` on that sample and read the file so I can answer in one sentence.
Retrying with the full file content as the prompt.
**tokentrail_compare** (context_role=system, reuse_count=10): **caching_preferred** — 1,721 effective text tokens; cache saves ~79% vs imaging (rule R1).

It is a TokenTrail benchmark sample that simulates a large, repeatedly reused agent system prompt with padded appendices to test high-reuse caching recommendations.
